# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - name: projects.serviceAccountKey
    params:
      serviceAccountName: my-service-account
      iamRole: roles/editor
      keyType: RSA_4096
      keyAlgorithm: RS256
      keyPolicy: '{
        "version": "20171118",
        "etag": "$ETAG",
        "statement": [
          {
            "effect": "allow",
            "principal": "*",
            "action": [
              "cloudplatform.googleapis.com/projects/*/roles/editor"
            ],
            "resource": "*"
          }
        ]
      }'
    properties:
      projectId: ${projectId}

  - name: cloudresourcemanager.projects.createServiceAccountKey
    params:
      serviceAccountName: my-service-account
      keyType: RSA_4096
      keyAlgorithm: RS256

deployments:
  - name: create-service-account-key
    properties:
      projectId: ${project.id}
    resources:
      - createServiceAccountKey
      - projects.serviceAccountKey
